programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Lord Ashfordly's staff come under suspicion when some African carvings are stolen from the hall - but then an African chieftain arrives claiming the very same pieces belong to his tribe. Vernon sees a business opportunity that needs the royal stamp of approval and probationary PC Tom Nicholson turns up at the station. Nostalgic drama, starring Jason Durr, Rupert Vansittart and Geoffrey Hughes.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The Dingles are puzzled as to why Zak has turned up with a mystery woman. Kim walks in on Kathy and Dave enjoying a drink together. Frank celebrates Kim leaving.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Vic and Viv have a blazing row in the back room of the post office. Butch attempts to stop Zak blowing all his money on Marilyn. Roy is involved in an horrific accident.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Norris attempts to bond with Derek. Leo tells Curly he will fire him if he does not resign. Don visits a solicitor and tells the Platts they will fight it out in court.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Raquel and Bet are thrilled for Betty when she breaks the news of her engagement. Steve and Vicky return from honeymoon. Bet encounters trouble from the brewery.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Community spirit in the village of Morton Fendle is dealt a blow by the collapse of a craft centre in which many locals had invested - and Alan Hollingsworth, the businessman behind the project, has become a public hate figure. Barnaby investigates when Hollingsworth's wife disappears, and seems to have been kidnapped. However, when Hollingsworth is subsequently murdered and his wife reappears safe and sound, he suspects an elaborate scheme. Roger Allam guest stars.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Lord Ashfordly's staff come under suspicion when some African carvings are stolen from the hall - but then an African chieftain arrives claiming the very same pieces belong to his tribe. Vernon sees a business opportunity that needs the royal stamp of approval and probationary PC Tom Nicholson turns up at the station. Nostalgic drama, starring Jason Durr, Rupert Vansittart and Geoffrey Hughes.(n)

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Isobel suggests using Downton as a place of convalescence following a distressing incident at the village hospital. Shell-shocked new valet Lang arrives as William gets his call-up papers, and Carson strives to keep standards high, but suffers a panic attack in front of the family. Lady Rosamund is eager to unearth Lavinia and Carlisle's secret after overhearing them arguing, and romance blossoms for both Edith and Mary. Costume drama, starring Jim Carter, Samantha Bond and Cal Macaninch.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Farmer Alex Preston is found dead at the sacred Crowcall stone circle in Midsomer Mow. Suspicion initially falls on local druids led by high priests Ezra Canning and Leticia Clifford, since Preston's plans to plough Gorse Meadow would have barred their access to the site. Barnaby and Jones are joined by new pathologist Kate Wilding to investigate, and as the case wears on, the inspector becomes convinced greed rather than spiritualism is the motive. Starring Neil Dudgeon, Jason Hughes and Tamzin Malleson.(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: The detective is faced with a dilemma when a murder investigation leads him to the radar station where his missing son was working on a highly classified operation - just as Hitler launches a major offensive on Britain's RAF airfields. To solve the mystery, Foyle must penetrate the closed ranks of the airforce. Second World War crime drama, starring Michael Kitchen, Julian Ovenden, Honeysuckle Weeks, Anthony Calf, Roger Allam and Anton Lesser.(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Nick tells Gail he does not want to fight Don. The football team wins its first match and Curly is permanently dropped. Derek snaps and tells Norris he has had enough of him.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The Platts try to explain to Sarah that Nick changing his name will not stop him being her brother. Raquel feels she is being messed around by Leo when he postpones their date.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zoe wants Frank to give his blessing to the wedding. Kim is not happy with the new housekeeper.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zoe is furious with Frank, while Kim and Dave receive a frosty welcome in the Woolpack. Butch tries to exert some authority over the rest of the Dingles.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Part one of two. Mike faces a stressful time as he struggles to cope with his wife's departure, and Tricia offers him a shoulder to cry on, but is beset by problems of her own after prescribing birth control to a 16-year-old. Meanwhile, Sergeant Craddock finds his efforts to prepare for an important visit hampered by a series of attacks on the station, and Vernon makes a startling discovery in his bathtub. Jason Durr and Clare Calbraith star.(n)

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: When Mildred finds out that George only has a small endowment, she decides to do something about it. However, George is none too happy when he realises that he is worth more dead than alive. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce.(n)

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: George trades his car in for a battered caravan, and Mildred's sister and brother-in-law arrive, leading to problems in the bedroom. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy, Yootha Joyce, Norman Eshley and Sheila Fearn.(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: The girls find it tough sharing with one man, but their problems double once Robin's friend Larry moves in. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan.(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: First episode of the drama, starring Michael Kitchen as a jaded police superintendent who would rather be fighting the enemy in France than crime on the south coast as the Second World War gathers pace in 1940. However, when a local magistrate's German wife is murdered amid a growing cloud of uncertainty and anti-Nazi feeling, the ensuing investigation is anything but routine. Edward Fox, Robert Hardy, David Horovitch, Anthony Howell and Honeysuckle Weeks co-star.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Part two of two. Carl Lomax's case comes to court, and a local reporter soon rakes up the dirt over Tricia's controversial decision to supply his girlfriend with birth-control drugs. Before long, he escapes from custody and goes on the run with Deborah. Meanwhile, Vernon invests in a new money-making scheme.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zoe and Emma plan their blessing ceremony. The poachers return and Chris is on the warpath. An old flame of Emma's turns up at the Woolpack.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zoe is jealous of Emma's old girlfriend Susie. Tina winds Kim up. Frank presents Kim and Dave with a video of which they are the main stars. Kim vows to kill Frank.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mavis hopes the Duckworths will pull out of buying Des's house. Maxine tries to attract Des's attention. Nick legally changes his name to Tilsley.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Raquel is shocked when Leo attacks her. The Wiltons are horrified when number nine goes up for sale. Betty is embarrassed when drunken Billy swears his love for her in the pub.(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.sub-title: Two Foot Two, Eyes of Blue
programme.desc: Robin and Chrissy go babysitting, but the baby will not stop crying, and the drinks cupboard is locked. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan and Paula Wilcox.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: English country squire Marcus Waverly receives a series of anonymous letters threatening to kidnap his son Johnnie, but the case is dismissed by Scotland Yard - prompting Poirot to open his own investigation. Drama, starring David Suchet and Geoffrey Bateman.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Part two of two. Carl Lomax's case comes to court, and a local reporter soon rakes up the dirt over Tricia's controversial decision to supply his girlfriend with birth-control drugs. Before long, he escapes from custody and goes on the run with Deborah. Meanwhile, Vernon invests in a new money-making scheme.(n)

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Cora makes a discovery that throws the inheritance issue into chaos, and Mary is prompted to keep Matthew waiting for an answer to his proposal. Robert arranges for Mrs Patmore to see an eye specialist, and O'Brien digs up more compromising information about Bates, but the Earl's response comes as a surprise. Thomas leaves the Abbey and Mary exacts vengeance on Edith for her treachery, while the household is rocked by a shocking announcement. Drama, starring Maggie Smith, Hugh Bonneville and Elizabeth McGovern.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a woman is drowned in a bath and made to look like a bride, with a chilling lipstick message on the bathroom mirror, it triggers a spate of ghoulish wedding-themed murders in Great Worthy. The case takes Barnaby and Jones to a donkey sanctuary, a heritage steam railway and a pub run by an ex-policeman and former brothel madam as they try to identify the killer. Guest starring Pam Ferris (Rosemary & Thyme) and Kacey Ainsworth (formerly EastEnders' Little Mo).(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: As the Second World War continues to rage, Foyle investigates a pro-Hitler organisation he suspects may be linked to a mysterious death at the White Feather Hotel, while reluctant assistant Milner struggles to decide where his loyalties lie. Crime drama, starring Michael Kitchen and Anthony Howell, with Charles Dance and Maggie Steed.(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The murder of a well-known business tycoon leads Morse to investigate the man's feuding family, and inadvertently makes him the unwitting target of a hate campaign by the tabloids - a problem compounded by his uneasy relationship with a new chief superintendent. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star alongside Gwen Taylor, Martin Clunes, Alun Armstrong, Anna Massey, Charlotte Coleman and Rupert Graves.(n)

To solve the mystery, Foyle must penetrate the closed ranks of the airforce. Second World War crime drama, starring Michael Kitchen, Julian Ovenden, Honeysuckle Weeks, Anthony Calf, Roger Allam and Anton Lesser.(n)

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: The team is hired by the West German government to discover who is operating a pension fund for five ex-Nazis wanted for war crimes.(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: The death of a patient leaves a dedicated nurse facing a negligence charge, until the crusading medical examiner and his sidekick make an important discovery.(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: An emotionally disturbed taxi driver becomes obsessed with the controversial host of a radio talk show. He decides to stalk and kill the people that she speaks out against on her programme and Theo must catch up with the man before he spirals out of control.(n)

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.sub-title: The Man with the Twisted Lip
programme.desc: A woman asks Holmes to search for her missing husband, a businessman who was last seen peering from the window of an opium den in London's notorious Limehouse area. Suspicion falls on a well-known local beggar - but his innocence is eventually proved in bizarre fashion. Period drama, starring Jeremy Brett.(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.sub-title: A Bird in the Hand Is Worth Two in Shepherd's Bush
programme.desc: While Arthur is away on business in Europe, Ray is given the task of guarding a valuable racing pigeon - but does not appear to have his mind on the job. Comedy drama, starring George Cole and Gary Webster.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are assigned to protect a deposed African politician, who is due to attend a conference with a view to regaining power. After foiling two assassination attempts, they soon appreciate others share information on his whereabouts. Charles Dance and Geoffrey Palmer feature alongside stars Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins.(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: With Haskins in Toronto, his stand-in DCI Quirk (guest star Bill Maynard) becomes obsessed with catching a gang of thieves. When information is received suggesting the crooks are about to rob a jeweller's shop, officers are poised for action, but events take an unexpected turn as the informant seemingly has a score to settle with Quirk first. Hard-hitting police drama, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman.(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: Two pyromaniacs are accused of arson, but Quincy is convinced they are innocent, despite the seemingly overwhelming evidence against them.(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A rookie cop also has two civilian jobs, but his debts are mounting and he needs to pay for his wife's psychiatric treatment. In desperation, he goes to work for a loan shark.(n)

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: An intruder begins breaking into people's homes and destroying their plaster statuettes of Napoleon, but leaving more valuable items untouched. Holmes resolves to find out why, eventually uncovering a twisted tale of theft and murder. Jeremy Brett stars as the master detective.(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur becomes concerned about security at the lock-up, and employs Ron the burglar to install the latest hi-tech alarm system. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole and Gary Webster.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle suspect Russian intervention when a mentally unstable lieutenant colonel holding valuable Nato secrets disappears from an army psychiatric hospital. Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson star.(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A suspect collapses while being questioned and rushed to hospital with injuries likely to have been incurred in an assault. Though innocent, Regan finds himself targeted by the man's vengeful brother who thinks the detective is responsible for his sibling's condition. Gwen Taylor guest stars in the police drama, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman.(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught.(n)

programme.title: Giant Lobster Hunters
programme.desc: The Bold contender's skipper Squizzy hopes to capitalise on the season-high lobster price. He hunts around Bruny Island in Southern Tasmania, targeting 1,900 brindle lobsters and is under huge financial pressure to be successful.(n)

programme.title: Jaws (1975)
programme.desc: A New England seaside town's tourist season is turned into a nightmare by a giant killer shark. The local police chief's efforts to protect the public are thwarted by the greedy mayor, forcing him to join forces with a grizzled fisherman and an enthusiastic marine biologist to hunt and kill the monster predator. Steven Spielberg's thriller, starring Roy Scheider, Richard Dreyfuss and Robert Shaw.(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A teenager dies after taking a seemingly harmless pill, prompting ever-vigilant Quincy to launch a campaign to stop its production and close down a local shop that sells the pills.(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A teenager accidentally kills one of a mobster's henchmen during a robbery gone wrong, and ends up being hired by a rival gangster who wants the young crook to eliminate his rivals.(n)

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Suffering from nervous exhaustion, Holmes sets off for a break on the wild Cornish peninsula, where he hopes the peace and quiet will help him convalesce. Unfortunately, several murders ensure his holiday is far from relaxing. Period detective drama, guest starring Denis Quilley.(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur comes up with a plan to boost business at the Winchester Club by staging variety nights. The idea proves popular until the karaoke machine, rented from the fearsome Gabadini family, is stolen. George Cole stars.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Doyle and Bodie pose as hitmen to infiltrate a mysterious group of hire killers whose targets are all retired government officials, and supposedly no longer of any strategic importance. Adventure, with Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson.(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Carter's wife Alison is targeted by a hit-and-run driver while performing a routine errand on his behalf. Police investigations reveal she was wearing the coat of a fellow teacher with dubious connections. Patrick Troughton and Liz Smith guest star, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman.(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught.(n)

programme.title: Apollo 13 (1995)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about the ill-fated 1970 Apollo 13 mission to the moon. Crew leader Jim Lovell is faced with a nightmare when the mission suffers an on-board explosion - leaving the team stranded in space with a dwindling oxygen supply while flight controllers and engineers in Houston try to find a way to bring the crew safely back to Earth. With Tom Hanks, Kevin Bacon, Bill Paxton, Ed Harris and Gary Sinise.(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: When a series of murders committed by the same gun, but by different killers, crosses his table, Quincy attempts to track down the murder weapon.(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A singer's father is released from prison after serving 14 years for a murder he did not commit. Fearing he will seek revenge, she asks Theo's help in proving his innocence.(n)

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The mystery surrounding a legendary racehorse's disappearance is solved with the help of one of the most famous clues in the Holmes canon - 'the curious incident of the dog in the night-time'. Victorian detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett and Edward Hardwicke.(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur dabbles in the world of nouvelle cuisine, taking bookings on banquets. However, his chef goes on the run from a group of gangsters leaving him in the lurch when catering for a policeman's retirement party. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole and Gary Webster.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Cowley is tasked with finding out whether a woman is crying wolf with her tales of being terrorised by a masked stalker. Suspicion falls on one of her work colleagues, an inveterate human rights campaigner, who keeps pictures of her in his flat. Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson star.(n)

programme.title: When English Football Ruled Europe
programme.desc: A look at English clubs' dominance of European football between 1977 and 1984. The first of two programmes looks at Liverpool's back-to-back European Cup triumphs in 1977 and 1978, and Nottingham Forest emulating the feat the following two years.(n)

programme.title: Euro 96 Relived
programme.desc: A look back at the semi-final, as the rivals met at Wembley Stadium in a gripping contest that was decided by a penalty shootout. Bob Wilson hosted the coverage, with analysis by Glenn Hoddle, Jack Charlton and John Barnes, and commentary from Brian Moore and Kevin Keegan.(n)

programme.title: Mike Bassett: England Manager (2001)
programme.desc: An inept soccer coach is unexpectedly chosen as England's new manager. His dismal efforts see him go from national treasure to most hated man in England in record time - but the chance of redemption comes when a rules loophole puts his team in the running for the World Cup. Comedy, starring Ricky Tomlinson, Amanda Redman, Philip Jackson, Bradley Walsh and Phill Jupitus.(n)

programme.title: Out of Their Skin
programme.desc: Part one of two. Ian Wright charts the inspiring rise of black footballers in Britain, from Viv Anderson's debut as England's first senior black player in 1978, with the aid of archive footage, original interviews and a compilation of individual stories from the past and present. Contributors include Paul Ince, Ashley Cole, Les Ferdinand, John Barnes, Raheem Sterling and Marcus Rashford.(n)

programme.desc: The team is hired by the West German government to discover who is operating a pension fund for five ex-Nazis wanted for war crimes.(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home.(n)

programme.title: World of Sport: TV Firsts
programme.desc: Richard Henwood looks back at television sporting firsts, including footage of a 14-year-old Ronnie O'Sullivan who would go on to take snooker by storm.(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A teenager dies after taking a seemingly harmless pill, prompting ever-vigilant Quincy to launch a campaign to stop its production and close down a local shop that sells the pills.(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A teenager accidentally kills one of a mobster's henchmen during a robbery gone wrong, and ends up being hired by a rival gangster who wants the young crook to eliminate his rivals.(n)

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Suffering from nervous exhaustion, Holmes sets off for a break on the wild Cornish peninsula, where he hopes the peace and quiet will help him convalesce. Unfortunately, several murders ensure his holiday is far from relaxing. Period detective drama, guest starring Denis Quilley.(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur comes up with a plan to boost business at the Winchester Club by staging variety nights. The idea proves popular until the karaoke machine, rented from the fearsome Gabadini family, is stolen. George Cole stars.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Doyle and Bodie pose as hitmen to infiltrate a mysterious group of hire killers whose targets are all retired government officials, and supposedly no longer of any strategic importance. Adventure, with Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson.(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Carter's wife Alison is targeted by a hit-and-run driver while performing a routine errand on his behalf. Police investigations reveal she was wearing the coat of a fellow teacher with dubious connections. Patrick Troughton and Liz Smith guest star, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman.(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: When a series of murders committed by the same gun, but by different killers, crosses his table, Quincy attempts to track down the murder weapon.(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A singer's father is released from prison after serving 14 years for a murder he did not commit. Fearing he will seek revenge, she asks Theo's help in proving his innocence.(n)

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The mystery surrounding a legendary racehorse's disappearance is solved with the help of one of the most famous clues in the Holmes canon - 'the curious incident of the dog in the night-time'. Victorian detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett and Edward Hardwicke.(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur dabbles in the world of nouvelle cuisine, taking bookings on banquets. However, his chef goes on the run from a group of gangsters leaving him in the lurch when catering for a policeman's retirement party. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole and Gary Webster.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Cowley is tasked with finding out whether a woman is crying wolf with her tales of being terrorised by a masked stalker. Suspicion falls on one of her work colleagues, an inveterate human rights campaigner, who keeps pictures of her in his flat. Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson star.(n)

programme.title: When English Football Ruled Europe
programme.desc: A look at English clubs' dominance of European football between 1977 and 1984. The first of two programmes looks at Liverpool's back-to-back European Cup triumphs in 1977 and 1978, and Nottingham Forest emulating the feat the following two years.(n)

programme.title: Euro 96 Relived
programme.desc: A look back at the semi-final, as the rivals met at Wembley Stadium in a gripping contest that was decided by a penalty shootout. Bob Wilson hosted the coverage, with analysis by Glenn Hoddle, Jack Charlton and John Barnes, and commentary from Brian Moore and Kevin Keegan.(n)

programme.title: Mike Bassett: England Manager (2001)
programme.desc: An inept soccer coach is unexpectedly chosen as England's new manager. His dismal efforts see him go from national treasure to most hated man in England in record time - but the chance of redemption comes when a rules loophole puts his team in the running for the World Cup. Comedy, starring Ricky Tomlinson, Amanda Redman, Philip Jackson, Bradley Walsh and Phill Jupitus.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: A mysterious furry pink animal moves in with Bean, who doesn't know what it is but can't bring himself to get rid of such an odd creature.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Bean plans a romantic meal with his girlfriend, only to fall asleep while the main course is in the oven. With the voice of Rowan Atkinson.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Bean is forced to retrieve a tennis ball from the roof of a house across the road, but gets paralysed by vertigo 60ft up and has to rely on a hamster to steer him to safety. With the voice of Rowan Atkinson.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Eating too many sweets gives Bean a terrible toothache, and when all other attempts at curing it are exhausted, he reluctantly visits the dreaded dentist.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: The halfwit becomes a hero after rescuing a kitten from a tree, and looks forward to having his picture in the local paper. With the voice of Rowan Atkinson.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: An endless cacophony of loud noises from next door drives Mr Bean to distraction, filling his mind with thoughts of revenge.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Bean pretends he's been the victim of an accident in the hope of gaining attention, but ends up in hospital.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Bean tries to redecorate the hall, but the landlady's nasty one-eyed cat obstructs him at every turn - until he puts it in the dustbin.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Faced with a long shopping list from his formidable landlady, the hapless half-wit builds a giant motorised trolley from a petrol mower and pram wheels, hoping to get the job done in double-quick time.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: The police suspect Bean of stealing his landlady's jewellery - but the real culprit is a magpie he's been nursing back to health.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: The fur flies when Scrapper is left in Mr Bean's care - and it's not the creepy cat who needs looking after in the end. With the voice of Rowan Atkinson.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: A milkman accidentally walks off with a maritime curio belonging to Bean _ who indignantly follows him to the bottling plant at the local dairy, determined to retrieve it.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: The bumbling half-wit makes friends with a goldfish while his teddy is away at the cleaners, but a trip to the seaside makes him think again. With the voice of Rowan Atkinson.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mrs Wicket gets a new lodger who happens to be an inventor, so Bean foolishly tries to outdo him in the ingenuity stakes. With the voice of Rowan Atkinson.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: An unscrupulous mechanic cons Mr Bean out of his beloved car, but it's not long before he's found an alternative mode of transport which sends his spirits soaring. With the voice of Rowan Atkinson.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: An encounter with a stuck-up film star ruins Bean's visit to a restaurant - and an involuntary swim in a lobster tank makes matters even worse.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Bean witnesses the theft of a major work of art at London's National Gallery, and pursues the culprit across the Channel to Paris - only to get waylaid by a mime artist.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: A trip to the cinema to see a spooky film scares Bean half to death.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean goes on a date with his girlfriend, complete with romantic movie and candlelit dinner.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: The bumbling blockhead is mistaken for an escaped convict and finds himself behind bars - where he soon makes himself at home while the real baddie has an awful time in the hands of Bean's landlady.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: The hapless hero visits the Science Museum, where he makes a new friend with a bagful of gadgets.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: An old school friend turns up on Mr Bean's doorstep and is soon eating him out of house and home. With the voice of Rowan Atkinson.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Irma Gobb watches TV with Mr Bean but his set explodes during an argument, leaving the hapless halfwit to invent his own form of home entertainment.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: A piano teacher meets his match in the most inept pupil ever to tinkle an ivory - none other than Mr Bean, who has got it into his head to complete Beethoven's unfinished symphony.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Bean is ecstatic to learn his favourite singer is performing at the London Palladium and moves heaven and Earth to get her to sign his autograph book. With the voice of Rowan Atkinson.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: The buffoon is delighted to meet a man with exactly the same tastes as himself - but jealousy soon rears its ugly head. With the voice of Rowan Atkinson.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: The frogspawn in Bean's bathroom begin hatching, and before long the house is full of angry amphibians - just as the mayor is about to arrive for tea.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Bean is invited to lunch at the stately home of an aristocratic lady who isn't all she seems. With the voice of Rowan Atkinson.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Inspired by a documentary on Buckingham Palace, Bean sets out to decorate his room in royal style, and landlady Mrs Wicket suffers delusions of grandeur.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Bean gets involved in a marrow-growing contest with his neighbour and, as the competition hots up, he tries all sorts of weird and wonderful methods to win. With the voice of Rowan Atkinson.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: A fun run gives Mr Bean the chance to take revenge on the man who stole his parking space - but he has to hire a taxi to do it. With the voice of Rowan Atkinson.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: A hungry stork moves in with Bean and starts eating him out of house and home. His solution is to return it to the wild - but first he has to teach it to fly.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: The hapless bumbler attempts to make his own home movie, a horror thriller with Mrs Wicket in the starring role. With the voice of Rowan Atkinson.(n)

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Mystery Incorporated
programme.desc: Fred, Daphne, Velma, Shaggy and Scooby investigate why bugs are swarming over Crystal Cove and attacking the residents.(n)

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Mystery Incorporated
programme.desc: The gang is invited to compete in the annual Teen Mystery Solvers' Convention, a weekend affair where teams from around the country attempt to solve conundrums.(n)

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Mystery Incorporated
programme.desc: A rowdy biker gang rolls through Crystal Cove, and Fred is upset when Daphne gets a crush on its leader. The gang members fall under suspicion when valuable military equipment goes missing and only Daphne is convinced of their innocence.(n)

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Mystery Incorporated
programme.desc: An evil woman called Aphrodite stalks Crystal Cove, seeking the destruction of the town. Her strategy involves the use of a love potion, rendering all but Scooby powerless to prevent her ambition being realised.(n)

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Mystery Incorporated
programme.desc: Fred, Daphne, Velma and Shaggy investigate the disappearance of the original Mystery Inc team - a task that takes them inside an abandoned mansion where a crazy old man traps them.(n)

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Mystery Incorporated
programme.desc: Strange Kung Fu wizards begin attacking the town in a bid to get at a ring owned by an exchange student who is staying with Velma - so the gang decides to help out, but friction arises when Shaggy develops a crush on their new friend.(n)

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Mystery Incorporated
programme.desc: Shaggy and Scooby become unwitting participants in a spooky reality TV show after winning a dinner date with their hero Vincent Van Ghoul.(n)

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Mystery Incorporated
programme.desc: Velma feels left out of the gang until she makes friends with a 'mer-woman', who tells her that fish freaks have been attacking boats in Crystal Cove harbour. She almost gets herself killed when investigating the case alone, so the other gang members step in to help - but the closer they get to solving the mystery, the more dangerous the situation becomes, and the more Velma risks losing her special friend.(n)

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Mystery Incorporated
programme.desc: A theme park is taken over by a manticore, an ancient beast with the body of a dragon, the face of a man and the tail of a scorpion.(n)

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Mystery Incorporated
programme.desc: Fred's favourite adventurer Rick Spartan comes to take over the school's biology class, but he is being haunted by the Headless Creature.(n)

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Mystery Incorporated
programme.desc: Scooby and the gang arrange a mass sleepover to deal with a poltergeist that is attacking Mayor Jones.(n)

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Mystery Incorporated
programme.desc: Fred, Daphne, Velma and Shaggy investigate when the ghost of Crystal Cove's first sheriff tries to get Sheriff Stone to quit his job.(n)

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Mystery Incorporated
programme.desc: Fred, Daphne, Velma, Shaggy and Scooby are attacked by a high-tech assassin called the Obliteratrix, and investigate the curse of Crystal Cove with the help of Professor HP Hatecraft.(n)

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Mystery Incorporated
programme.desc: A monster known as the Freak of Crystal Cove tries to prevent the gang finding out why the original Mystery Incorporated disappeared.(n)

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Mystery Incorporated
programme.desc: Fred, Daphne, Velma and Shaggy join the canine detective to investigate reports that Crystal Cove is being tormented by an evil man-baby called Crybaby Clown.(n)

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Mystery Incorporated
programme.sub-title: The House of the Nightmare Witch
programme.desc: Velma and Hotdog Water work for Mr E to retrieve a museum exhibit from Moscow, which comes to life and torments Crystal Cove.(n)

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Mystery Incorporated
programme.sub-title: The Night the Clown Cried II: Tears of Doom
programme.desc: The Crybaby Clown returns with a vengeance, kidnapping citizens of Crystal Cove. The gang sets to work bringing their old enemy to justice, but things get personal when Daphne becomes the villain's latest victim.(n)

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Mystery Incorporated
programme.desc: The gang investigates the Dreamweaver, who is causing citizens to destroy the things they love the most.(n)

programme.desc: Magoo thinks that he is peeling off old wallpaper on Linda's walls, but he is actually destroying Fizz' hypnotic posters.(n)

programme.desc: Magoo finds himself shrunk and then dragged inside the President's head, along with Fizz. He thinks the hamster is a little, lost boy and decides to help him.(n)

programme.desc: Magoo is thinks is out trick-or-treating for Halloween. But he unwittingly robs a bank instead of Weasel.(n)

programme.title: Mr Magoo

programme.title: Mr Magoo

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo thinks that Fizz is a hat he is going to wear for his romantic date with Marnie. That's bad enough, but Fizz has a very important job to do!(n)

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: At the supermarket, Magoo mixes his shopping cart up with a baby stroller. Fizz decides to save the toddler and become a media star.(n)

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo thinks Weasel has opened a restaurant, and wants to help him improve it. He mistakes the FizzLab for a kitchen!(n)

programme.title: Mr Magoo

The 1920s Gatsby-themed dress code goes down a storm with almost everyone, on a night featuring food ending up on the floor, smoke alarms going off and some entertaining cocktail-making.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Oil and gas purchasing specialist Sylvian hosts the third dinner party in Aberdeen, hoping her attention to detail and an ambitious global themed menu will be enough to impress her guests. Philippines-born Sylvian's dishes are an East-meets-West affair, starting with Japanese gyoza, followed by a Sumatran rendang and ending with a very British sticky toffee pudding. But dessert turns out to be sticky in more ways than one; cue tears before bedtime from the host.(n)

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Aberdeen, it's the turn of comedy promoter Naz to host. If Naz is to stand a chance of winning the competition, he must find a way to placate his guests, nearly all of whom he has managed to offend over the week. Naz is, by his own admission, not the greatest cook and things don't go according to plan and much of his food is burned and difficult to chew. Ever the eternal optimist however, Naz thinks that his humour and conviviality will win over his critics and earn him the grand.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final night of the competition in Aberdeen finds journalist Turid hoping her home-grown produce will tantalise her guests' taste buds. Can Turid knock Sylvian off the top spot and walk away with the £1,000 prize?(n)

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Calamity ensues at the B&B in France when guests are too tall for the beds. In Spain the sisters are close to breaking point juggling staff shortages at the height of the season.(n)

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A fortune-teller gives Lisa an unwelcome glimpse of the future, revealing the highs and lows of her romance with a dashing upper-class suitor. Featuring the guest voice of Mandy Patinkin as Lisa's future fiance.(n)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Evil Mr Burns plumbs new depths with a plan to make a greyhound-fur tuxedo out of Santa's Little Helper's huge litter of puppies. Understandably shocked, Bart and Lisa try to rescue their faithful friend's offspring.(n)

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather.(n)

programme.title: Britain's Best Parent?
programme.desc: Twelve families with differing parenting styles compete against each other, hoping to prove that their methods and techniques are the right way to raise children. Those taking part in the first episode include Joana, who believes children shouldn't be confined to traditional gender stereotypes and is raising her five-year-old with a gender-fluid approach. Self-titled lazy parents Kevin and Kerry believe that their hands-off style makes their two boys self-sufficient and aware of the consequences of their actions, while Rin and Robin's parenting style is inspired by Eastern culture and philosophy, as they aspire to make 'scholar-warriors' of their son and daughter. Presented by Anita Rani.(n)

programme.title: First Dates Hotel
programme.desc: Another group of singletons hope to find love while staying in the luxury Italian hotel. Checking in first is Fiona, the 62-year-old mother of Duncan James from boy band Blue. She has come to stay on the recommendation of her son, who featured on last year's celebrity version. Will ex-naval officer Eric be the man for her? Others looking for a little fun in the sun are chef James and actor Jamie, and care home manager Hayley, who describes her ideal man as a 'Viking' and confident. Enter 6ft 4 car salesman Nick, who has confidence in spades.(n)

programme.title: The Imposter (2012)
programme.desc: Bafta-winning documentary about the case of Nicholas Barclay, a 13-year-old boy who went missing, and the man who claimed to be the youngster years later, having apparently escaped being held captive. His radically different appearance and personality raised suspicion, but the child's family accepted him unquestioningly. Featuring contributions from the people involved in the case and filmed re-enactments of key events.(n)

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade and comedian Ellie Taylor head to the Spanish capital for a two-day break, following an itinerary rich in art, history, histrionics and ham. The pair go on a guided tour in which they view masterpieces by Bosch, Velasquez, Picasso and Dali, before they attend a ham-carving workshop and a sample a five-course tasting menu, of which four courses are pork or ham, including a tartare dish. They also take in a lively boating lake, a circus church and a grisly tour of the Spanish Inquisition.(n)

programme.desc: Earl enters the Big Swirl Around-the-Island race - but the car Shirley built for him does not work exactly as planned.(n)

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: Boo easily lifts the weights at an outdoor gym, so Hopper resorts to cunning and balloons to improve his physique.(n)

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: The broadcaster and guests discuss the issues of the day, with co-host Storm Huntley joining him for phone-ins and reading out viewers' correspondence.(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Kate faces trouble from unruly tenants, who became anti-social, and are now trying to sue her for serving them an eviction notice. Dhiren relates how the existing tenant of a house he bought stopped paying rent as soon as he took ownership, and Tim explains how a health scare left him seeking to sell his property - but a standing occupant refused to leave.(n)

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world.(n)

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: The ladies battle for the attention of a handsome TV actor who appears at their local theatre.(n)

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Rose has a near-death experience after she collapses and ends up in hospital. However, the events give her a fresh outlook which prompts her to move out.(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Bella prepares to take her relationship with Nik to the next level. Elsewhere, Leah gives her victim impact statement, but the details disturb Justin.(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Sheila's daughter makes a surprise appearance and resolves to help her mother. Elsewhere, Andrea makes Elly's life a misery.(n)

programme.title: Witness to a Murder (2017)
programme.desc: A woman and her teenage daughter move to a remote country town under the witness protection programme. However, they soon find themselves on the run when their new identities are compromised. Thriller, starring Yancy Butler and Karis Cameron.(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Birthing Video
programme.desc: Monica prepares a Valentine's Day surprise for Chandler, while Ross has difficulty telling girlfriend Mona that Rachel has moved in. Phoebe tries to lift Joey's spirits by bringing him a remarkably cheerful dog. Starring Courteney Cox.(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Tells Rachel
programme.desc: Ross has difficulty coming to terms with Joey's revelation, but eventually persuades him to tell Rachel how he feels about her, regardless of the consequences. Meanwhile, Chandler is disturbed by Phoebe's new boyfriend, who shares a number of personality traits with Monica.(n)

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world.(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Sheila's daughter makes a surprise appearance and resolves to help her mother. Elsewhere, Andrea makes Elly's life a misery.(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Bella prepares to take her relationship with Nik to the next level. Elsewhere, Leah gives her victim impact statement, but the details disturb Justin.(n)

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories.(n)

programme.title: Around the World by Train with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: The actor goes on rail journeys around the globe, jumping on and off trains to find adventure and face challenges, while exploring the history and culture of each place he visits.(n)

programme.title: Inside the Steam Train Museum
programme.desc: Documentary following the endearing characters who banded together to keep Bressingham Steam Museum in Norfolk - which is run as a charity - going. In the first edition, new volunteer Phil learns how to drive a steam engine, despite doubting his abilities. Brian the museum's carpenter repairs a golden cockerel for the Victorian gallopers, but struggles when it comes to fitting it.(n)

programme.title: Fare Dodgers: At War with the Law
programme.desc: A prolific offender is landed with an eyewatering bill to square off three years of illegal travel, while the police must step in when one suspect is found in possession of a banned substance. At one of London's busiest stations, vigilant inspectors Scott and Michelle have success intercepting repeat offenders, but will they catch a notorious passenger who the station staff report comes through their station each day?(n)

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.sub-title: Paddington: A Year on the Tracks
programme.desc: Autumn gets off to a wet start when the roof of Paddington begins to leak during torrential rainfall, and with gales of up to 90mph, Network Rail staff brace themselves as a storm closes in on the UK. A flyaway plastic bag causes a loss of power, trapping three trains and disrupting Paddington's peak service. Mobile operations manager Jane is called out when a van hits a low-level bridge, while British Transport Police in Bristol Temple Meads get more than they bargained for when they search a teenager suspected of using drugs on board a train.(n)

programme.title: The Tube: Going Underground
programme.desc: At Leicester Square station, customer service assistants Ric and Kingsley are faced with crowds of ghosts, ghouls and demons as Halloween partygoers pass through, while the emergency response team is sent to St John's Wood after passengers report hearing gunfire. Meanwhile at King's Cross, engineer Pete leads a massive weekend track-replacement operation, but he and his team hit an unexpected problem.(n)

programme.title: Police: Hour of Duty
programme.desc: Officers search for a man reported missing by his partner, while detectives question a man who is alleged to have been grooming a 14-year-old boy. Back at Comms HQ, the force incident manager coordinates a response to assist a teenager who has been stabbed, and armed officers are sent to search and arrest the suspects at their premises, where they also discover a cannabis factory.(n)

programme.title: Tiger Bay (1959)
programme.desc: A Polish sailor flees Cardiff's docklands after murdering his girlfriend in a jealous rage, initially unaware that a 12-year-old tomboy has witnessed the crime and has taken his abandoned gun to show off to her friends. However, he comes back to abduct the girl in a bid to keep her quiet - but the pair form a friendship and she tries to help him escape the police. Thriller, starring Hayley Mills in her film debut alongside her father John, with Horst Buchholz.(n)

programme.title: Elephant Walk (1954)
programme.desc: A woman struggles to come to terms with her tea plantation owner husband's obsession with his dead father. Melodrama, starring Elizabeth Taylor, Peter Finch, Dana Andrews and Abraham Sofaer.(n)

programme.title: Freedom Radio (1940)
programme.desc: A Viennese doctor tries to maintain business as usual while living under Nazi rule. However, events take a sickening turn when his wife begins wholeheartedly espousing Hitler's views - prompting him to start broadcasting Allied propaganda from a secret transmitter. Second World War drama, starring Clive Brook, Diana Wynyard, Raymond Huntley and Derek Farr.(n)

programme.title: Fantastic Voyage (1966)
programme.desc: A medical team is miniaturised and injected into the bloodstream of a scientist to repair his severely damaged brain - unaware that one of the microscopic passengers has sabotage on his mind. Richard Fleischer's sci-fi adventure, starring Raquel Welch, Stephen Boyd, Donald Pleasence and Edmond O'Brien.(n)

programme.title: The Simpsons Movie (2007)
programme.desc: Homer unwittingly pollutes Lake Springfield, so the US government decides to isolate the city underneath a giant dome. The Simpsons manage to escape and plan to start a new life in Alaska - but learn Springfield is about to be destroyed, and return to save their friends. With the voices of Dan Castellaneta, Julie Kavner, Nancy Cartwright and Yeardley Smith.(n)

programme.title: Arrival (2016)
programme.desc: The world is thrown into uproar when 12 alien spaceships arrive at locations around the globe. As tensions rise between nations and fear of the arrivals grows, a recently bereaved linguist is recruited by the US army to find a way to communicate with the aliens and discover why they have come. Sci-fi drama, starring Amy Adams, Jeremy Renner and Forest Whitaker.(n)

programme.title: Prisoners (2013)
programme.desc: Two young girls go missing in Pennsylvania over the Thanksgiving holidays, and suspicion initially falls on Alex Jones, a young man with apparent learning difficulties, who was spotted near the children's last known location. When no evidence of wrongdoing is found, Jones is freed from custody, but the distraught father of one of the missing youngsters is not convinced of Jones' innocence, and kidnaps him in the hope of extracting a confession by force. Thriller, starring Hugh Jackman, Jake Gyllenhaal and Paul Dano.(n)

programme.title: Smashed (2012)
programme.desc: Teacher Kate and her husband Charlie are both alcoholics, but manage to keep it a secret. A series of bad experiences makes Kate realise her drinking is getting out of control, and she resolves to give it up. However, Charlie refuses to admit he has a problem, placing a strain on their relationship. Drama, starring Mary Elizabeth Winstead and Aaron Paul.(n)

programme.title: Stalag 17 (1953)
programme.desc: The inmates of a German PoW camp are convinced there is a traitor in their midst when the guards seem to be forewarned of their escape attempts. An unassuming sergeant content to remain a captive until the end of the conflict becomes the focus of suspicion as mob mentality takes hold. Billy Wilder's Second World War drama, starring an Oscar-winning William Holden, with Don Taylor, Otto Preminger and Harvey Lembeck.(n)

programme.title: The Buccaneer (1958)
programme.desc: A general charged with the defence of New Orleans in 1812 learns the British are sending a vast fleet to retake the city. His only hope is to form an alliance with a notorious pirate - but while the buccaneer's loyalties are to his homeland, his crew urges him to side with the invaders. Remake of Cecil B DeMille's classic swashbuckling adventure, directed by Anthony Quinn, starring Yul Brynner, Charlton Heston, Claire Bloom and Charles Boyer.(n)

programme.title: A Night to Remember (1958)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama recreating the sinking of the Titanic, told from the point of view of the ship's second officer as he struggles to get as many passengers and crew off the vessel before it sinks. Meanwhile, the captain of a nearby vessel embarks on a doomed rescue mission. Starring Kenneth More, Honor Blackman, Ronald Allen, Tucker McGuire and David McCallum.(n)

programme.title: Project Almanac (2015)
programme.desc: Following the death of his inventor father, a teenager finds plans for a time-travel device. He and his friends decide to build it, and together they embark on an amazing adventure back in time - but soon discover the perils of altering history. Sci-fi thriller, starring Jonny Weston, Sofia Black-D'Elia and Sam Lerner.(n)

programme.title: American Made (2017)
programme.desc: A pilot is recruited to act as a courier for the CIA in the 1980s, carrying out covert deliveries from the US to General Noriega's regime in Panama. However, he exploits the opportunity to set up a profitable sideline trafficking drugs for a cartel. His dangerous double life takes a darker turn when he is ordered to supply weapons to far-right rebel groups operating in Nicaragua. Fact-based comedy drama, starring Tom Cruise and Domhnall Gleeson.(n)

programme.title: The Fifth Estate (2013)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama following the rise of whistleblowing website WikiLeaks and its ultimate involvement in the biggest ever security breach in the history of the US government - an event that takes its toll on the relationship between founders Julian Assange and Daniel Domscheit-Berg. Starring Benedict Cumberbatch, Daniel Bruhl, David Thewlis and Peter Capaldi.(n)

programme.title: A Pigeon Sat on a Branch Reflecting on Existence (2014)
programme.desc: Two bickering travelling salesmen wander the country, trying and failing to sell a range of joke shop products and having a series of strange encounters with people who give them a taste of the darker side of human existence. Comedy, starring Holger Andersson and Nils Westblom. In Swedish and English.(n)

programme.title: The Malta Story (1953)
programme.desc: The island of Malta comes under siege during the Second World War, as both Allied and Axis forces see it as vital to their supply lines. A British reconnaissance pilot arrives on the island, and plays a crucial role in defending it from the advancing enemy forces. Drama, starring Alec Guinness, Anthony Steel, Jack Hawkins, Muriel Pavlow and Flora Robson.(n)

programme.title: Ride Lonesome (1959)
programme.desc: A bounty hunter captures young killer Billy John, but his real motive is not the cash reward - he has an old score to settle with his prisoner's brother Frank. As the journey to bring the murderer to justice gets under way, he is counting on a showdown with Frank and accepts the help of two outlaw gunmen for added protection, aware they will try to turn Billy John in themselves for the reward and a pardon. Western, with Randolph Scott, Lee Van Cleef, James Best, James Coburn and Pernell Roberts.(n)

programme.title: Esther Waters (1948)
programme.desc: A kitchen maid succumbs to the advances of a caddish stable lad and falls pregnant - but is abandoned for another woman. Period drama, starring Dirk Bogarde and Kathleen Ryan.(n)

programme.title: The Man from Laramie (1955)
programme.desc: A cavalry officer determines to avenge the death of his brother, but rather than target the Apaches who killed him, he vows to go after the gang who supplied them with their weapons - leading to conflict with the sadistic son of an elderly rancher. Anthony Mann's Western, starring James Stewart, Arthur Kennedy, Donald Crisp and Cathy O'Donnell.(n)

programme.title: Non-Stop (2014)
programme.desc: An air marshal on a transatlantic flight receives mysterious messages in which an anonymous terrorist threatens to kill one passenger every 20 minutes unless a ransom is paid. He searches the plane for the criminals responsible, but his investigation is threatened when he is framed as being the mastermind behind the plot. Action thriller, starring Liam Neeson, Julianne Moore and Lupita Nyong'o.(n)

programme.title: Beast (2017)
programme.desc: Moll Huntingdon works as a Jersey tour guide and lives with her parents, under the strict rules of her controlling mother Hilary. One day she's saved from a sexual assault on the deserted beach by a stranger with a gun. Writer-director Michael Pearce's thriller, starring Jessie Buckley, Johnny Flynn and Geraldine James.(n)

programme.title: A Bigger Splash (2015)
programme.desc: A rock star recovering from surgery retreats to the peaceful surroundings of a Mediterranean island with her lover. Their seclusion is disrupted by the arrival of an old flame and his estranged teenage daughter, and a complex, tempestuous relationship develops between the four of them, bringing old memories to the surface. Drama, starring Tilda Swinton and Ralph Fiennes.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.desc: Miles and Sabrina decide to make a horror film, and everyone wants to take part. Hilda and Zelda are called to do Other Realm Scare Duty.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Josh returns from Prague with a surprise. Miles and Roxy take part in a research experiment.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Lennox is annoyed when Zander decides to move in with two female students at college. Meanwhile, Joe goes against Mel's wishes and agrees to act as a wingman to his recently divorced friend Charlie on a night out. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel's father comes to town to help her announce her candidacy for state senate, but jeopardises his daughter's chances when he sends a racy photo to everyone involved in her campaign after Joe teaches him about selfies. Meanwhile, Ryder tries to find a winning idea for his entrepreneur's club project. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben gets it into his head that Riley fancies him when the pair are left alone after Tucker and Danny fail to turn up for movie night. Comedy series, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau, Chelsea Kane and Derek Theler.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben discovers his neighbour Kayla is hosting a playgroup for the neighbourhood kids, but is excluding his daughter because Kayla believes Ben to be a horrible father. Meanwhile, Danny asks Riley for help when his relationship with Amy hits a rocky patch. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys become stranded in the middle of nowhere when Leonard's car is stolen en route to the Bakersfield comic-book convention. Meanwhile, back at home, the women try to work out why the guys are so fascinated with such publications.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is furious when the university forces him to work with Kripke, while Howard's hobby lands him in financial trouble. However, that doesn't stop him and Raj getting expensive action figures of themselves made - much to Bernadette's disapproval.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry takes inspiration from Lionel Richie and sets about creating a sculpture of Lainey as the ultimate Valentine's Day gift. Murray advises Adam to defy his mother and sneak into a screening of the restricted-rated film Porky's, and Geoff agrees to be just good friends with Erica.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam's plan to reignite his fading relationship with Dana by taking her to a 'Weird Al' Yankovic concert backfires. When Barry and Erica become peer counsellors at school, they worry that Murray may be feeling depressed. 'Weird Al' Yankovic and Tim Meadows guest star.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Santiago hosts a Thanksgiving dinner at her apartment for all her colleagues, but the event risks turning into a disaster, especially when Holt and Peralta have to leave in a hurry to catch a thief who has stolen a large sum of money from the evidence lock-up. Can Boyle save the day?(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta is put in charge of Captain Holt's security after he receives several death threats - a responsibility he not only enjoys, but also abuses as much as he can. Santiago tries to encourage her colleagues to take a Christmas photo, only to be met with a lack of enthusiasm - and Diaz's refusal to smile. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tests a newly invented device after hearing that it can help him to read people's emotions. Leonard isn't happy when he finds out that Penny's brother is coming to town so that she can help him to find a job. Raj gathers his ex-girlfriends together so that they can give him some dating advice.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Howard attempt to distract Sheldon with a trip to a historic railway when he slows the progress of their work on the Air Force guidance system. Raj and Stuart look after baby Halley, while Penny and Amy take Bernadette out.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel gets a strange visit from her doctor, who drops by at Halloween to try to convince her that she was once a powerful teenage witch. At first she and Joe don't believe it, but then she accidentally turns Lennox into a cat, and Joe's Halloween robot Scary Larry comes to life. Return of the comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: As Mel and Joe prepare for their first Christmas together as a couple, competition heats up over whose ornament should take the prestigious top spot on the tree. To champion the worthiness of the ornamental star that has been owned by the Burkes for generations, Mel tells an elaborate tale from way back in her family's history.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Riley makes a bet with Ben that he cannot get a second date with Heather, but when she fails to jump at the chance to go out with him again, Ben resorts to desperate measures to win the wager. Bonnie meets a handsome stranger and considers ending her relationship with Brad. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau and Chelsea Kane.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Tucker acts like a lawyer in front of his father because he has forgotten to tell him he has dropped out of law school and works in TV. Meanwhile, Riley has a crush on a British guy, but Bonnie mistakenly thinks she has fallen for Danny. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle asks Peralta to be his best man, but as well as helping out with cake-tasting and choosing invitations, he must also persuade the groom to start standing up to Vivian before the big day. Holt helps Diaz make a sincere apology and Jeffords, Santiago and Gina embark on a tough new diet - but struggle to stick to it.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta enlists Jeffords to help him tackle a cold case that everyone thinks is unsolvable. Meanwhile, Santiago plans a romantic weekend away with her new boyfriend Teddy, and Gina and Diaz tell Boyle one of their best-kept secrets. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Melissa Fumero.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam worries about being 'hazed' by the older students when he goes to high school, but he soon earns their respect by body-slamming Barry. Erica and her friends talk about what they are going to put into their school-time capsule.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam works on a new persona that he hopes will make him seem cool on his first day at high school. Beverly gets her teaching certificate and aims to work as a substitute teacher at her children's school, but things go awry and the kids end up in a Saturday detention. But after Murray pays a visit to the school, everyone learns an important lesson. Tim Meadows and Allie Grant guest star.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang become concerned when Sheldon's former admirer, Dr Ramona Nowitzki, resurfaces while Amy is away working at Princeton University. Jim Parsons stars.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy must decide whether or not to marry Sheldon and gives him an answer to his proposal. Howard and Bernadette struggle with some unexpected news. With guest stars Laurie Metcalf, Riki Lindhome and Stephen Hawking.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Marcel Somerville of Blazin' Squad and Love Island fame hosts tonight's dinner party, but misjudges his main course and comes in for some tough questions about his reality TV past.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Boyle investigate a serial killer who poses a severe danger to the public. Captain Holt continues to spar with his rival, Commissioner Kelly. Jeffords must deal with some complications resulting from his recent news about his lieutenant's exam.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and his father deal with unsettled family business. Amy and Rosa work a high-profile case. Terry wants to join the NYPD band.(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: At the start of the new term, Carli organises a fashion show that Simon is eager to participate in. Will tries to shake off his embarrassing reputation, while Jay continues to lie about his sexual experiences. Comedy, starring Emily Head, Joe Thomas, Simon Bird, James Buckley and Blake Harrison.(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon goes to his first gig since seeing Take That at Wembley Arena, hoping to impress an attractive girl in the year below, but Will, Jay and Neil tag along and jeopardise his chances of wooing her. Comedy, starring Joe Thomas, Simon Bird, James Buckley and Blake Harrison.(n)

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: Comedy set against the Troubles in early-1990s Northern Ireland. The start of a new school term gets off to a bad start for Erin when she wakes to find her cousin reading her diary. But there is worse to come when Granda Joe announces a bomb has been found on the bridge. Saoirse-Monica Jackson stars.(n)

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: Everyone is excited when Sister Michael announces that this year's school trip is to Paris, and Clare and James decide that they want to improve their French. Meanwhile at the Quinn house, Uncle Colm, Granda Joe's extremely boring brother, is visiting and the whole family are losing the will to live.(n)

programme.title: The IT Crowd
programme.desc: Jen has to handle a difficult builder, Roy loses £20, and Moss learns how to stand up for himself against a bunch of ruffians. Starring Chris O'Dowd, Katherine Parkinson, Richard Ayoade and Matt Berry.(n)

programme.title: The IT Crowd
programme.desc: Roy and Moss revel in their masculinity when they discover a new football website, but cannot keep up the charade for long. Jen has a date with a man who looks like a magician. Comedy, starring Chris O'Dowd, Katherine Parkinson and Richard Ayoade.(n)

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Dressed head-to-toe in pink, Gibby, the family's former au pair, makes a visit - surprising the boys who have absolutely no memory of her. The visitor soon gets on Mum and Dad's nerves, as not only does she cry at just about anything, but is also obsessed with traditional English cream tea after becoming hooked on the stuff when she stayed with the Goodmans. To make matters even more fraught, Jim pops round and instantly develops an infatuation with her. Comedy, starring Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Tamsin Greig, Paul Ritter, Mark Heap and Sally Phillips.(n)

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Dad seems terribly miserable on his birthday, and no one seems to know the reason why. Mum, Adam and Jonny are dumbstruck when he finally reveals the reason is that he's realised he'll never go into space because he has used a website to calculate the date he's going to die. Jim conjures up some special 'tricks' for the occasion and Grandma Goodma - aka Horrible Grandma - turns up uninvited, thus making a terrible birthday the worst yet. Comedy, starring Paul Ritter, Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal and Tamsin Greig.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon feels threatened by a 15-year-old physics prodigy who is even cleverer than he is, and asks Leonard to help him discredit the precocious teenager's research. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star.(n)

programme.desc: Leonard, Raj and Howard kick Sheldon off their physics quiz team and replace him with Leslie Winkle, so he decides to prove his superiority by forming a rival quartet of his own. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Audrey is upset when Jeff is too distracted to focus on the issue of finding a surrogate, until they finally agree on an unexpected resolution. programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Josh throws himself into his new job as a photojournalist with the Boston Citizen, but spends too much time socialising with lonely boss Mike Shelby and neglects Sabrina. Guest starring George Wendt.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina takes her friends on a spooky murder-mystery excursion aboard an old-fashioned train, little suspecting she's accidentally transported them into the Other Realm - a region hazardous to mortals.(n)

programme.desc: Ryder pretends he is a college student so he can date one of Zander's room-mates, and Mel is less than pleased when Joe inherits a chair from his grandmother. Meanwhile, Lennox and Zander avoid discussing their feelings for each other. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel thinks she might be pregnant, but is unsure how to tell Joe, who is in the middle of preparing for an important business pitch. Meanwhile, Ryder forms a study group with an eclectic mix of people, and Lennox and Zander get their wires crossed.(n)

programme.desc: Ben learns that is it all his fault that Riley does not like celebrating her birthday. He plans a surprise to make it up to her but, in typical fashion, disaster ensues. Meanwhile, Bonnie reveals that she forgot to complete some paperwork and that Ben isn't Emma's sole custodian. Starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben and Danny wear elf suits on their quest to find a particular Christmas gift for Emma, while Riley and Tucker help Bonnie plan a seasonal celebration. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau and Tahj Mowry.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Goldbergs

Murray refuses to let Beverly help out at the furniture shop when sales take a nosedive, but she's convinced the latest home furnishing craze holds the answer.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As they bond over their shared love for the movie Dirty Dancing, Beverly is thrilled when Erica suggests the film as the theme for the upcoming school dance. programme.desc: Peralta tries to make a deal with a suspect Diaz has just arrested in an attempt to catch a car thief he has been tracking for years. programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago's ongoing bet about who can make the most arrests comes to an embarrassing conclusion, while Boyle receives a medal following the shooting, but his pain medication loosens his tongue and he starts to reveal what he really thinks of his colleagues.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is furious when she learns that Sheldon has shared intimate details of their relationship with his colleagues at the university, prompting their first fight since moving in together. Raj considers trying to live without financial support from his father, who thinks he is spoilt.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Cut off from his father's fortune, Raj struggles to balance his books, so decides to appoint Sheldon to organise his finances and get him out of debt. Penny considers joining the guys at Comic-Con because she thinks Leonard wants her to come along.(n)

Comedy, with Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe refuses to allow Dani out on a date with a boy from school, so she tricks Mel into taking her along instead. Lennox and Marco's relationship is revealed when they run into Zander, and a new rivalry erupts between the two men over an internship with an artist.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben's attempts to flirt with a student who goes to Riley's new British boyfriend's college go awry, causing Philip to potentially face losing both his job and his visa. Meanwhile, Tucker puts on a fake English accent in order to attract women.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: A horrified Ben realises that he once dated Tucker's new girlfriend, and he soon becomes convinced that she only got together with Tucker to get back at him for their terrible break-up. programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

Boyle is devastated when Vivian ends their relationship, so his colleagues try to cheer him up.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher.(n)

programme.desc: Erica and Lainey try to set Lainey's father Bill up with a 'woman of interest' by using new video dating technology. Barry decides he wants to be a gym teacher and starts to act as Coach Mellor's apprentice. David Koechner and Allie Grant guest star.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard angers the university - and the entire physics community - when he gives an embarrassing interview. Amy and Bernadette bond over having to hide their success from Sheldon and Howard. Ira Flatow and Regina King guest star.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As Sheldon stresses out about picking a wedding date, Amy tries to convince him that he has a more laid-back side. Meanwhile, Raj and Stuart compete to win the heart of Bernadette's new colleague Ruchi. Swati Kapila guest stars.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Gogglesprogs

programme.desc: The restaurant opens its doors for a special episode in aid of Stand Up to Cancer, with maitre d' Fred and his team welcoming celebrity singletons who are all embarking on blind dates with unsuspecting members of the public. Capital FM DJ Roman Kemp wonders whether marketing assistant Lucy would be able to cope with his early morning work schedule, and former newsreader Jan Leeming - who has been married five times - worries that potential suitors may be scared off by her dating history.(n)

First up is 19-year-old student Marlie from Yorkshire, who keeps choosing the bad boys - which is driving her mum mad. There's also 30-year-old Adam, from Bradford. Having previously had his heart broken, he is now looking for a woman with no secrets, and believes that if the contestants are willing to bare all on TV, they probably have nothing to hide.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny makes fun of Leonard's habit of collecting sci-fi memorabilia, so he decides to give it up - but his friends object and do everything possible to persuade him not to change his ways. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's friends all fall for his sexy twin sister, who is paying him a visit, but he declares he will have the final say on who can date her - an announcement that particularly dismays Leonard. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons.(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The nation's favourite armchair critics share their opinions on shows airing in April 2016, including Guy Martin's Wall of Death: Live, Bake Off Creme de la Creme, EastEnders, Bear Grylls: Mission Survive, Antiques Roadshow, This Farming Life, The Night Manager and the news. The programme captures their instant reactions and lively - sometimes emotional - discussions from the comfort of their own homes.(n)
